name: SCC_GetEnergyTransferType
title: SCC_GetEnergyTransferType
description: Gets the energy transfer type (DIN 70121) resp. -mode (ISO 15118) from various messages.
return:
Type of requested power supply:
AC_Charging = 0,
DC_Charging = 1
The EnergyTransferType resp -Mode string is additionally written to the output buffer. If this is not required, an empty string can be transferred.
